Creators note ➜ haii I tried doing q atrawpage as some of you suggested but it was really buggy for me and it confused me a lot so im still on the hunt for something for requests... ALSO ALSO ALSO I WANTWD TO DO A MEDIEVAL BOT FOR SO LONG BUT NEVER HAD AN IDEA SO THIS WAS PERFECT

anyways.. credit time!!
